title: The Royal Tomb and the Poneglyph
main_description: Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
key_events: The Royal Tomb and the Poneglyph
Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
